entity.label: Peleth
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: A Reubenite whose son was one of the conspirators against Moses and Aaron (Num. 16:1).

nodes.label: Peleth
nodes.description: A Reubenite whose son was one of the conspirators against Moses and Aaron (Num. 16:1).

verses.text: Now Korah, the son of Izhar, the son of Kohath, the son of Levi, and Dathan and Abiram, the sons of Eliab, and On, the son of Peleth, sons of Reuben, took men:
